name: qwen-book-pipeline
description: MCP server for Qwen3.6-35B-A3B end-to-end book pipeline. Provides tools to start vLLM servers, run 6-stage book generation pipelines, manage checkpoints, and render bilingual EN-VN PDFs. Use when generating technical books, managing LLM pipelines with vLLM, or running STORM-style research workflows.
